title: District Judge Nayagarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Steno, Junior Clerk and More Posts
short_info: The District Judge Nayagarh has officially announced the Group "C" Vacant Posts Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website https://nayagarh.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates aged between 18 and 42 years and holding qualifications such as +3 examination or equivalent with Diploma in Computer Application for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist and Stenographer Grade-III, and Matriculation with Revenue Inspector Training for Salaried Amin can submit their offline applications by 18 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and applicat

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years (as on 18.06.2026) Age relaxation for women and reserved categories shall be as per the provisions of the Act, Rules, Orders or Instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: For Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist and Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application. For Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training.
qualification.details: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Able to speak, read and write Oriya and have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. Standard Minimum speed of 80 words per minute in Shorthand and 40 words per minute in Typewriting through computer system for the post of Stenographer Grade-III | Citizen of India Matriculation examination or equivalent Revenue Inspector Training Able to speak, read and write Oriya and have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. Standard

salary_details.pay_scale: Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- - 81,100/- (Level-7); Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- - 63,200/- (Level-4); Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- - 69,100/- (Level-5)
salary_details.details: Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- - 81,100/- (Level-7) Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- - 63,200/- (Level-4) Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- - 69,100/- (Level-5)

selection_process: Written Examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test Shorthand & Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade-III)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Judge Nayagarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nayagarh.dcourts.gov.in/ or https://nayagarh.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
